CurrentIssues.ID: ImplicitDefaultLocale:ItemsEndpointBenchmark.kt$ItemsEndpointBenchmark$String.format("%-26s %6d %9d %8d %8.2f %8.2f", it.name, it.items, it.bytes, it.queries, it.p50ms, it.p95ms)
ImplicitDefaultLocale:ItemsEndpointBenchmark.kt$ItemsEndpointBenchmark$String.format("%-26s %6s %9s %8s %8s %8s", "scenario", "items", "bytes", "queries", "p50ms", "p95ms")
LargeClass:SubsonicApiIntegrationTest.kt$SubsonicApiIntegrationTest : HttpIntegrationTestBase
LoopWithTooManyJumpStatements:ArtistPaginationIntegrationTest.kt$ArtistPaginationIntegrationTest$while
LoopWithTooManyJumpStatements:MpdProtocolIntegrationTest.kt$MpdProtocolIntegrationTest.MpdClient$while
MaxLineLength:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$"adapters may use domain types for protocol translation but must delegate all business logic to use cases, never calling domain handlers directly"

MaxLineLength:ArtistPaginationIntegrationTest.kt$ArtistPaginationIntegrationTest$val body = objectMapper.readTree(get("/Items?ParentId=$artistId&Recursive=true&Limit=4&StartIndex=$start", token).response.contentAsString)

MaxLineLength:AudioStreamIntegrationTest.kt$AudioStreamIntegrationTest$MockMvcRequestBuilders.get("/Audio/$trackId/stream").header("Authorization", "Bearer $token").header(HttpHeaders.RANGE, "bytes=0-1023")

MaxLineLength:AuthIntegrationTest.kt$AuthIntegrationTest$val updateCtx = CommandContext(UserId(userId), ProtocolId("JELLYFIN"), Instant.now(), IdempotencyKey(UUID.randomUUID().toString()), user.version)
MaxLineLength:CoreBeansConfiguration.kt$CoreBeansConfiguration$fun
MaxLineLength:GlobalExceptionHandler.kt$GlobalExceptionHandler$)

MaxLineLength:GroupSyncIntegrationTest.kt$GroupSyncIntegrationTest$val sched = post("/v1/groups/$groupId/schedule", mapOf("expected_epoch" to 0, "action" to "PLAY", "positionMs" to 5000, "paused" to false), token)
MaxLineLength:GroupSyncService.kt$GroupSyncService$.
MaxLineLength:MpdProtocolIntegrationTest.kt$MpdProtocolIntegrationTest$private fun elapsedSeconds(client: MpdClient): Double

MaxLineLength:PersonalizedTracksPaginationIntegrationTest.kt$PersonalizedTracksPaginationIntegrationTest$val body = objectMapper.readTree(get("/Items?IncludeItemTypes=Audio&SortBy=DatePlayed&StartIndex=0&Limit=$trackLimit", token).response.contentAsString)

MaxLineLength:RadioStationIntegrationTest.kt$RadioStationIntegrationTest$"INSERT INTO core_v2_ml.track_features (track_id, embedding_mert, extracted_at, extractor_version) VALUES (?, CAST(? AS vector(768)), ?, ?)"
SpreadOperator:YaytsaApplication.kt$(*args)

TooManyFunctions:GlobalExceptionHandler.kt$GlobalExceptionHandler

UnusedParameter:GlobalExceptionHandler.kt$GlobalExceptionHandler$ex: AccessDeniedException
UnusedParameter:GlobalExceptionHandler.kt$GlobalExceptionHandler$ex: HttpMediaTypeNotAcceptableException
UnusedParameter:GlobalExceptionHandler.kt$GlobalExceptionHandler$ex: HttpMessageNotReadableException
UnusedParameter:GlobalExceptionHandler.kt$GlobalExceptionHandler$ex: NoResourceFoundException
UnusedParameter:GlobalExceptionHandler.kt$GlobalExceptionHandler$request: HttpServletRequest

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$// ── Rule 10: domain must not call Instant.now() ────────────────────── @ArchTest val `domain must not call Instant_now`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.domain..") .should() .callMethod(java.time.Instant::class.java, "now") .because("domain handlers must receive time from CommandContext, not read the system clock")

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$// ── Rule 11: application must not call Instant.now() ────────────────── @ArchTest val `application must not call Instant_now`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application..") .should() .callMethod(java.time.Instant::class.java, "now") .because("application layer must receive time through Clock port or CommandContext")

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$// ── Rule 12: domain must not call System.currentTimeMillis() ────────── @ArchTest val `domain must not call System_currentTimeMillis`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.domain..") .should() .callMethod(System::class.java, "currentTimeMillis")

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `adapters must not depend on domain handlers`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAnyPackage( "dev.yaytsa.adapterjellyfin..", "dev.yaytsa.adapteropensubsonic..", "dev.yaytsa.adaptermcp..", "dev.yaytsa.adaptermpd..", ).should() .dependOnClassesThat( com.tngtech.archunit.base.DescribedPredicate.describe( "are domain handlers", ) { clazz -> clazz.packageName.startsWith("dev.yaytsa.domain") && clazz.simpleName.endsWith("Handler") }, ).allowEmptyShould(true) .because( "adapters may use domain types for protocol translation but must delegate all business logic to use cases, never calling domain handlers directly", )

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application must not depend on persistence`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.persistence..")

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-adaptive must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.adaptive..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("adaptive")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-auth must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.auth..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("auth")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-karaoke must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.karaoke..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("karaoke")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-library must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.library..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("library")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-ml must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.ml..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("ml")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-playback must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.playback..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("playback")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-playlists must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.playlists..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("playlists")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-preferences must only import port subpackages from peer contexts`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.preferences..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat(nonPortClassesInPeerContexts("preferences")) .allowEmptyShould(true)

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-shared must not depend on JPA`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.shared..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat() .resideInAPackage("jakarta.persistence..")

VariableNaming:ArchitectureTest.kt$ArchitectureTest$@ArchTest val `application-shared must not depend on Spring`: ArchRule = noClasses() .that() .resideInAPackage("dev.yaytsa.application.shared..") .should() .dependOnClassesThat() .resideInAPackage("org.springframework..")
